scope: PDT-2474: Liabilities and receivables must not be generated with amount zero. All flows that create CustomerLiability or CustomerReceivable must not persist entities with initialAmount zero.
entry_points: Manual liability creation (API: CustomerLiabilityRequest with @DecimalMin(0, inclusive=false) on initialAmount)
Manual receivable creation (API: CustomerReceivableRequest with @Positive on initialAmount)
Request for disconnection / Disconnection of power supply (DisconnectionPowerSupplyRequestsService, DisconnectionOfPowerSupplyService -> customerLiabilityRepository.saveAndFlush)
Reversal of payment / manual liability offsetting (CustomerLiabilityService, CustomerReceivableService)
Billing run: Credit notes, invoice corrections, VAT base adjustments, Compensations (CustomerReceivableService, CustomerReceivableMapperService, CompensationReceivableService)
JPA persistence (all paths that call customerLiabilityRepository.save/saveAll/saveAndFlush or customerReceivableRepository.save/saveAll/saveAndFlush)

upstream.name: CustomerLiabilityMapperService
upstream.usage: Builds liability entities; skips zero-amount VAT base liability before saveAll

upstream.name: CustomerReceivableMapperService
upstream.usage: Builds receivable entities from invoice/VAT base

upstream.name: CustomerReceivableService
upstream.usage: Creates/saves receivables; skips zero-amount VAT base receivable before saveAll

upstream.name: phoenix-core-lib
upstream.usage: Contains entities, mappers, services, and ZeroAmountValidationListener

downstream.name: CustomerLiabilityService
downstream.usage: Multiple entry points for liability creation; all persist via repository (listener enforced)

downstream.name: CustomerReceivableService
downstream.usage: Manual and automatic receivable creation; VAT base skip logic and listener

downstream.name: BillingRunStartAccountingInvokeService
downstream.usage: Calls generateLiabilities and generateReceivables for billing run

downstream.name: InvoiceReversalProcessService
downstream.usage: Creates VAT base liabilities on reversal

downstream.name: UI/API clients
downstream.usage: Manual liability/receivable creation endpoints; validation errors if zero sent

downstream.name: Reporting/export jobs
downstream.usage: ExportLiabilitiesJobService, collections; assume no zero-amount records

integration_points: Manual liability/receivable REST API (request validation + listener on persist)
Late payment fine job (liability and receivable save)
Disconnection of power supply / request for disconnection (liability save)

what_could_break.item: Flows that compute amount from external data
what_could_break.location: Any service that builds CustomerLiability/CustomerReceivable with calculated amount
what_could_break.reason: If calculation yields zero, @PrePersist throws IllegalArgumentException; flow must skip or avoid building entity
Validation rejects (DecimalMin/Positive); clients get 400 with message

what_could_break.item: Billing run / invoice flows with zero total
what_could_break.reason: VAT base skip logic and listener prevent persist; no record created for zero—reporting may assume one record per invoice in some cases
Zero-amount reversal/cancellation would throw on persist; must be skipped or not created

what_could_break.item: Deposit / Late payment fine / Rescheduling / Payment / Disconnection
what_could_break.location: DepositService, LatePaymentFineService, ReschedulingService, PaymentService, DisconnectionOfPowerSupplyService, DisconnectionPowerSupplyRequestsService
what_could_break.reason: Any path that builds liability/receivable with amount zero will throw at save; flows must ensure non-zero or skip

what_could_break.item: Tests or integrations assuming zero-amount records exist
what_could_break.reason: Zero-amount records are no longer persisted; queries filtering by amount or counting may change

technical_details: Merge for PDT-2474: phoenix-core-lib only. MR phoenix/phoenix-core-lib!1736. Merge commit 5d33f7897 (Merge branch 'feature/PDT-2474' into 'dev'). Author: Mariam Gogoladze. Date: 2026-02-13. Files changed: build.gradle; entity/receivable/CustomerReceivable.java (+ EntityListeners ZeroAmountValidationListener); new ZeroAmountValidationListener.java (JPA @PrePersist, throws if CustomerLiability or CustomerReceivable initialAmount is zero); entity/customerLiability/CustomerLiability.java (+ EntityListeners); request CustomerLiabilityRequest.java (initialAmount validation); CustomerReceivableRequest.java (initialAmount validation); CustomerLiabilityMapperService.java (skip zero-amount VAT base liability); CustomerReceivableMapperService.java (zero-amount handling); CustomerReceivableService.java (skip zero-amount VAT base receivable). No merge found in phoenix-core, phoenix-billing-run, or other Phoenix repos for PDT-2474; scope is contained in phoenix-core-lib. Conditional sync: phoenix-core-lib already on dev; fetch to origin/dev skipped (host unreachable in environment).
